name: Protector with Eyes of Blue
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>青</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あお</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>き<ruby lang="jp"><rb>眼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>め</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>護人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もりと</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 1 LIGHT Tuner from your hand. You can target 1 Effect Monster you control; send it to the GY, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Blue-Eyes" monster from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Protector with Eyes of Blue" once per turn.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 1 LIGHT Tuner from your hand. You can target 1 Effect Monster you control; send it to the GY, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Blue-Eyes" monster from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Protector with Eyes of Blue" once per turn.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 1 LIGHT Tuner from your hand. You can target 1 Effect Monster you control; send it to the GY, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Blue-Eyes" monster from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Protector with Eyes of Blue" once per turn.

action: Sends from your field to your Graveyard
